column1: Luis Arraez leads the slate with unmatched consistency, hitting safely in nearly 78% of games and enjoying a strong platoon advantage at home against Dylan Cease. Xavier Edwards also draws a favorable matchup and benefits from a hitter-friendly park, but his recent production lags behind Arraez. Michael Harris II and Matt Olson offer upside with their own platoon edges, yet neither matches Arraez’s reliability atop the order. For Beat The Streak, Arraez stands out as the most dependable pick tonight.
